zh.Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Rumänien: 羅馬尼亞阿斯庫特亞 德 阿斯
zh.Veliko Turnovo, Veliko Tarnovo, Bulgarie: 保加利亞Велико Търново維利可 騰諾沃
zh.lifeSummary: 當Prince Ivan Stracimirović of Vidin Bulgaria於大約1324年出生在保加利亞Велико Търново維利可 騰諾沃時，他的父親Tsar Ivan Aleksandar Shishman of Bulgaria28歲，母親Sarah Theodora "The Convert" Basaraba Princess Of Wallachia23歲。他於1360年與Anna Slava of Wallachia在羅馬尼亞阿斯庫特亞 德 阿斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1396年9月15日在保加利亞Видин享年73歲。

zh-hans.Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Rumänien: 罗马尼亚阿斯庫特亞 德 阿斯
zh-hans.Veliko Turnovo, Veliko Tarnovo, Bulgarie: 保加利亚Велико Търново維利可 騰諾沃
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Prince Ivan Stracimirović of Vidin Bulgaria于大约1324年出生在保加利亚Велико Търново維利可 騰諾沃时，他的父亲Tsar Ivan Aleksandar Shishman of Bulgaria28岁，母亲Sarah Theodora "The Convert" Basaraba Princess Of Wallachia23岁。他于1360年与Anna Slava of Wallachia在罗马尼亚阿斯庫特亞 德 阿斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1396年9月15日在保加利亚Видин享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ivan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.description: Turks defeat Serbs at Kosovo Polje. Exposes the remaining Bulgarian territory to Ottoman occupation.

en.lifeSummary: When Prince Ivan Stracimirović of Vidin Bulgaria was born about 1324, in Veliko Turnovo, Veliko Tarnovo, Bulgaria, his father, Tsar Ivan Aleksandar Shishman of Bulgaria, was 28 and his mother, Sarah Theodora "The Convert" Basaraba Princess Of Wallachia, was 23. He married Anna Slava of Wallachia in 1360, in Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Romania. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 15 September 1396, in Vidin, Bulgaria, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Prince Ivan Stracimirović of Vidin Bulgaria est né environ 1324, à Veliko Turnovo, Veliko Tarnovo, Bulgarie, son père, Tsar Ivan Aleksandar Shishman of Bulgaria, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Sarah Theodora "The Convert" Basaraba Princess Of Wallachia, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Anna Slava of Wallachia en 1360, à Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Roumanie. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 15 septembre 1396, à Vidin, Bulgarie, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Prince Ivan Stracimirović of Vidin Bulgaria um 1324 in Veliko Turnovo, Veliko Tarnovo, Bulgarien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Tsar Ivan Aleksandar Shishman of Bulgaria 28 und seine Mutter Sarah Theodora "The Convert" Basaraba Princess Of Wallachia 23. Er hat 1360 in Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Rumänien Anna Slava of Wallachia geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 15. September 1396 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Vidin, Bulgarien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Prince Ivan Stracimirović of Vidin Bulgaria è nato il circa 1324 nel Veliko Turnovo, Veliko Tarnovo, Bulgaria, il suo padre, Tsar Ivan Aleksandar Shishman of Bulgaria, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Sarah Theodora "The Convert" Basaraba Princess Of Wallachia, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Anna Slava of Wallachia nel 1360, nel Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Romania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 15 settembre 1396, nel Vidin, Bulgaria, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Rumänien: ルーマニアアルジェsクウルテア ド アルジェs
ja.Veliko Turnovo, Veliko Tarnovo, Bulgarie: ブルガリアВелико Търновоベリコ ターノボ
ja.lifeSummary: Prince Ivan Stracimirović of Vidin Bulgariaが約1324年にブルガリアВелико Търновоベリコ ターノボで生まれた時，父Tsar Ivan Aleksandar Shishman of Bulgariaは28歳，母Sarah Theodora "The Convert" Basaraba Princess Of Wallachiaは23歳であった。1360年にルーマニアアルジェsクウルテア ド アルジェsでAnna Slava of Wallachiaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1396年9月15日にブルガリアВидинで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Prince Ivan Stracimirović of Vidin Bulgaria(이)가 대략 1324년 불가리아 Велико Търново 벨리코 터른보에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Tsar Ivan Aleksandar Shishman of Bulgaria(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Theodora "The Convert" Basaraba Princess Of Wallachia(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1360년 루마니아 아그s 커테아 데 아그s에서 Anna Slava of Wallachia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1396년 9월 15일 불가리아 Видин에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Prince Ivan Stracimirović of Vidin Bulgaria nasceu aproximadamente 1324, em Veliko Turnovo, Veliko Tarnovo, Bulgária, seu pai, Tsar Ivan Aleksandar Shishman of Bulgaria, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Theodora "The Convert" Basaraba Princess Of Wallachia, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Slava of Wallachia em 1360, em Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Romênia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 15 de setembro de 1396, em Vidin, Bulgária, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Prince Ivan Stracimirović of Vidin Bulgaria родился около 1324 г. в местности велико турново, Велико Търново, Болгария, его отцу по имени Tsar Ivan Aleksandar Shishman of Bulgaria было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Theodora "The Convert" Basaraba Princess Of Wallachia, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Slava of Wallachia в 1360 г. в местности куртеа де аргеs, аргеs, Румыния. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 15 сентября 1396 г. в местности Видин, Болгария в возрасте 73 лет.

sm.from 1345 to 1349: mai le 1345 e o'o I le 1349

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Prince Ivan Stracimirović of Vidin Bulgaria nació aproximadamente 1324, en Veliko Turnovo, Veliko Tarnovo, Bulgaria, su papá, Tsar Ivan Aleksandar Shishman of Bulgaria, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Sarah Theodora "The Convert" Basaraba Princess Of Wallachia, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Anna Slava of Wallachia en 1360, en Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Rumania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 15 de septiembre de 1396, en Vidin, Bulgaria, a la edad de 73 años.
